package rulecoverage

func PositiveJwtNoneAlgorithmRisk() string {
    ruleID := "jwt_none_algorithm_risk"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "JWT verification code that accepts `\"none\"` or `alg: \"\"` as valid signing methods, or uses `jwt.Parse` without `WithValidMethods`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
